feed.title: Intercultural Pragmatics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Intercultural Pragmatics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: A comparative analysis of the prosody ofyou knowin L2 and L1 English: functional and positional variations
entry.summary: Authors: Runyu Zhai, Min Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2025-8004 Pages: Page range: 123-161

entry.title: Cross-linguistic analysis of ‘point of no return’ idioms: a cognitive framework for evaluating pragmatic intersubstitutability
entry.summary: Authors: M. Fatih Adıgüzel, M. Pınar Babanoğlu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2026-0010 Pages: Page range: 163-195

entry.title: Notmates, notbastards: the ethnopragmatics ofcuntin Australian English
entry.summary: Authors: Henry Carls DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2026-0037 Pages: Page range: 197-221

entry.title: Multilingual pragmatics: comparison of implicature comprehension between trilingual and bilingual speakers of English
entry.summary: Authors: Naoko Taguchi, Ting Wen, Peiyao Zhang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2026-0014 Pages: Page range: 223-248

entry.title: Compliments as supportive moves in social media conflicts: intercultural patterns in L2 English production
entry.summary: Authors: Silvia Bruti, Gloria Cappelli, Nicoletta Simi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ip-2026-0049 Pages: Page range: 249-276
